data.name: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
data.value: Er du sikker på, at du vil slette din konto?

data.name: This action will permanently erase your profile and API keys from our servers.
data.value: Denne handling sletter permanent din profil og API-nøgler fra vores servere.

data.name: Your existing shortened links will NOT be deleted. They will become 'headless' links and will continue to redirect users successfully. However, you will lose the ability to manage or track them. Only site administrators will be able to manage them.
data.value: Dine eksisterende forkortede links vil IKKE blive slettet. De vil blive 'headless' links og vil fortsat videresende brugere korrekt. Du vil dog miste muligheden for at administrere eller spore dem. Kun siteadministratorer vil kunne administrere dem.
